purpose: Make invariants runtime-active at boot instead of passive documentation.
boot_load_order: 3. Load active invariant JSON files from governance/invariants and registry invariant dirs.
5. Require *_GATE_EVALUATION.json before governed stages can release artifacts or modify runtime state.
6. Fail closed if engine or active invariant index is missing.

active_status_meaning.active: Boot-loaded and enforced by a named gate.
active_status_meaning.runtime_active: Boot-loaded, tested, and used in current stage decisions.

failure_mode: If active invariants cannot be loaded, governed execution must stop.
